creator: ganbold-freebsd@ateamsystems.com
text:
(In reply to ganbold-freebsd from comment #14)

I meant the problem still exists with:

galera-25.3.16                 Synchronous multi-master replication engine
mariadb101-server-10.1.14      Multithreaded SQL database (server)
mariadb101-client-10.1.14      Multithreaded SQL database (client)
